command: /bin/bash -lc "git status --short --branch && grep -nEi 'pull request|draft|merge|ready|outbox|recovery|GameApi|bos-mcp' SPEC.md | head -n 240 && find elixir/lib elixir/test -type f | sort | grep -Ei 'delivery|coordin|game_api|bos|outbox|recovery'"
outputSummary:
## bos/issue-10
3:Status: Draft v1 (language-agnostic)
57:- Support tracker/filesystem-driven restart recovery without requiring a persistent database; exact
671:  original task prompt that is already present in thread history.
725:### 7.4 Idempotency and Recovery Rules
730:- Restart recovery is tracker-driven and filesystem-driven (without a durable orchestrator DB).
731:- Startup terminal cleanup removes stale workspaces for issues already in terminal states.
762:- It is not already in `running`.
763:- It is not already in `claimed`.
1632:## 14. Failure Model and Recovery Strategy
1667:### 14.2 Recovery Behavior
1688:### 14.3 Partial State Recovery (Restart)
1691:Restart recovery means the service can resume useful operation by polling tracker state and reusing
1714:- Restarting the service for process recovery or deployment (not as the normal path for applying
2288:- Once a run has already produced side effects, a transparent rerun on another host SHOULD be
